evidence.q1: Section numbering 1-16 sequential; cross-references to Section 5 and Section 4 resolve.
evidence.q2: 'Assumed Liabilities' defined in Section 1 and used consistently; 'Excluded Liabilities' defined in Section 1/4 and used consistently.
evidence.q3: All time periods are specific (60 days, 12 months, 24 months); no vague time/quantity phrasing like 'next quarter' or 'reasonable while'.
evidence.q4: No archaic legal diction; modern commercial language throughout.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically correct and contain no internal contradictions.
evidence.q6: Register and drafting style consistent across all sections; no section reads like a different author.
